Tabler Icons Webfont
====================

This directory vendors the minimal runtime assets needed to render editor UI
icons with Tabler Icons in ImGui.

Source: https://github.com/tabler/tabler-icons
Package: @tabler/icons-webfont 3.44.0
License: MIT, see LICENSE

Only the generated outline TTF is included. The full Tabler repository is not
vendored into this engine.
